docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HARRIS TROY S. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAN BRUNO AUTO DISMANTLER SCOTT BASSETT (OWNER) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
